title: Graphite Tools
description: A light-weight mod for tools made from graphite
body:
This mod adds graphite tools. Nothing else.

Not even recipes or graphite itself, so if you want to use this, you will need to provide those on your own.
(For example with KubeJS)

The tools are about as good as Iron tools.

 

This mod was designed for personal use in modpacks.

If you want to include this in you own modpack, feel free to do so.
